assertion_results.text: A SKILL.md file exists in the output skill directory
The SKILL.md has valid YAML frontmatter with name and description fields
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 1-4: YAML frontmatter with --- delimiters contains name: git-commit-helper and description field

assertion_results.text: The name field uses only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens
The description includes 'Use when' trigger conditions
assertion_results.evidence: Line 3 description contains literal 'Use when writing commit messages, committing code, preparing git commits, working with monorepos...'

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body contains a numbered workflow or step-by-step instructions
assertion_results.evidence: 6 numbered steps: '### 1. Gather staged changes', '### 2. Analyze the diff', '### 3. Determine commit type', '### 4. Determine scope (monorepo)', '### 5. Write the commit message', '### 6. Present and confirm'

assertion_results.text: A scripts/ directory exists with at least one Bun TypeScript script (.ts file)
The script includes a --help flag or usage documentation
assertion_results.evidence: parse-diff.ts line 23: '--help            Show this help message' in HELP constant; line 287: args.includes('--help') handler

assertion_results.text: An evals/evals.json file exists with at least 2 test cases
assertion_results.evidence: evals/evals.json exists with 3 test cases (ids 1, 2, 3) each with prompt, expected_output, and assertions arrays

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body includes a Common mistakes or pitfalls section
assertion_results.evidence: Line 150: '## Common mistakes' section with 8-row table covering past tense, capitalization, period, scope, type mismatch, length, breaking change, and staging issues

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body is under 500 lines
assertion_results.evidence: SKILL.md is 183 lines total, well under the 500-line limit

assertion_results.text: The script uses structured JSON output to stdout
assertion_results.evidence: parse-diff.ts line 337: console.log(JSON.stringify(result, null, 2)) — outputs ParseResult object as JSON to stdout
